g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does React + Vite work together in this project?')
sendPrompt('How does Scrollama.js trigger chapter reveals?')
sendPrompt('What animations does Framer Motion handle?')
sendPrompt('How is Tailwind CSS configured for the Pelagic design system?')
sendPrompt('Describe the Mapbox GL JS ocean density map specification')
sendPrompt('What charts does Recharts render in Chapter 1?')
sendPrompt('What does the custom GeoJSON density layer contain?')
sendPrompt('What Pytrends queries does the data pipeline run?')
sendPrompt('Which subreddits does PRAW scrape and why?')
sendPrompt('What NLP analysis does NLTK/spaCy perform?')
sendPrompt('What does SerpApi return for this project?')
sendPrompt('What Brandwatch data feeds into Chapter 1?')
sendPrompt('What does search_trends.json contain?')
sendPrompt('What does reddit_word_freq.json contain?')
sendPrompt('What does brandwatch_mentions.json contain?')
sendPrompt('What does the plastic_density.geojson file look like?')
sendPrompt('What tools are used to produce the PDF collateral?')
sendPrompt('How many PDFs are in the collateral inventory?')
sendPrompt('What fonts are used across the PDFs?')
sendPrompt('How is the Vercel deploy configured?')
sendPrompt('What does the GitHub README cover?')
sendPrompt('What Jupyter notebooks are in the data pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is the target Lighthouse score?')
